SEARCH
Package qsim

Class ScreenerProfile

java.lang.Object
qsim.ScreenerProfile
public class ScreenerProfile extends Object
Describes a screener profile (performance and detection rate). Each screening lane supports one or several profiles, between which it can switch, as controlled by the profile selection policy.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    (package private) static enum 
    ScreenerProfile.Shape
    The shape of the screener profile (uniform or triangular)

    Description
    ScreenerProfile(long _L, long _H, double _d)
    Creates a profile with a uniform distribution

    Creates a profile with a triangular distribution

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) double
    avgCost()
    Computes the average processing time for the triangular or uniform distribution.
    (package private) boolean
    detects()
    Randomly returns true, with the probability equal to this profile's detection rate
    (package private) static ScreenerProfile
    findScreenerProfile(ParseConfig ht, String prefix)
    Looks for the parameters of a screener profile in the option store
    (package private) double
    serviceTime()
    Returns a random value in the range from L to H, subject to the uniform or triangular distribution with the mode at M.

  • Field Details

    • L

      final long L
      Parameters of the uniform or triangular distribution of the processing time. (There is no M in uniform distribution)

    • M

      final long M
      Parameters of the uniform or triangular distribution of the processing time. (There is no M in uniform distribution)

    • H

      final long H
      Parameters of the uniform or triangular distribution of the processing time. (There is no M in uniform distribution)

    • d

      final double d
      Detection rate, in the 0.0 to 1.0 range

    • shape

      final ScreenerProfile.Shape shape

  • Constructor Details

    • ScreenerProfile

      ScreenerProfile(long _L, long _M, long _H, double _d)
      Creates a profile with a triangular distribution

    • ScreenerProfile

      ScreenerProfile(long _L, long _H, double _d)
      Creates a profile with a uniform distribution

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • findScreenerProfile

      static ScreenerProfile findScreenerProfile(ParseConfig ht, String prefix) throws Parameters.ParseException
      Looks for the parameters of a screener profile in the option store
      Parameters:
      ht - the option store
      prefix - all option names should beging with this prefix (e.g. "p1.L", "p1.H" etc for prefix "p1."
      Returns:
      the screener profile composed of all the relevant options with the specified prefix, or null if no params with the specified prefix have been found.
      Throws:
      Parameters.ParseException - if some essential parameters are missing or have nonsensical values

    • avgCost

      double avgCost()
      Computes the average processing time for the triangular or uniform distribution.

    • detects

      boolean detects()
      Randomly returns true, with the probability equal to this profile's detection rate

    • serviceTime

      double serviceTime()
      Returns a random value in the range from L to H, subject to the uniform or triangular distribution with the mode at M.
